name: Zacatecas Silver Corp.
description: Zacatecas Silver Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of high-potential gold and silver projects in Mexico. The company’s flagship assets include the advanced-stage Esperanza Gold Project in Morelos State and the highly prospective Zacatecas Silver Project located in the prolific Fresnillo silver belt. Backed by an experienced team of mining and capital markets professionals, the company is committed to advancing these assets through efficient exploration and technical innovation, aiming to build shareholder value while contributing to the economic growth of the communities where it operates.
